name: Dragonball Z-Start Of Series
description:
Hey, welcome to Dragon Ball Z this time!

I built this to simulate DBZ, starting at the very beginning of Dragon Ball Z, just before Raditz arrives. Yep, Goku’s alive and clueless about being a Saiyan, Piccolo’s still hanging out training in the wilderness, Vegeta and Nappa are off in space, and nobody’s ever even heard of a “Super Saiyan” yet. Literally Saiyan Saga start. That pod? That's Raditz if you choose to meet him. Fucking marry him for all I care. Good luck.

Every saga is present — from the Saiyans, Namek, Androids and Cell, to Majin Buu, Battle of Gods, the Universe Tournaments, Goku Black, and beyond.

Yes, I meant EVERY SAGA: I added a custom 'Villain Vault' to trigger movie events if you mention them. For example if you do something like look for a strange tree on Earth? That'll start the Fruit Of The Tree Of Might. Turles, Janemba, The scary Broly, all of it. Just...give the bot a 'nudge'. Otherwise it'll ignore everything non canon. Just note you may fucking die if you try to summon Broly early with like...the Dragonballs.

➤ This is mature. Violence, death, betrayal, body horror (looking at you, Cell), and darker themes are all possible. Everyone is aged up to 18+ to keep things consistent and avoid creep issues. Even younger canon characters are written as aged-up if needed in bot description.

➤ NPCs evolve: Characters will remember what you do. If you spare Raditz, betray Goku, kill Krillin, or train with Piccolo — those choices stick If you mention Beerus in the Saiyan Saga? People (should HOPEFULLY) have no clue what you’re talking about until that arc actually happens, or if you force it in. Same goes for every saga — it’s all lore-locked. Also...feel free to die, I coded Otherworld. Snake Way, etc.

Just like my other bot? It’s open-ended at the start: maybe you ARE actually in West City, maybe you hear explosions nearby, maybe you just wander into Goku’s path. Or maybe you wanna be the ONE smart person in Dragonball and go...get those Dragonballs, wish for immortality. GG. You can slot in a backstory before play starts or just make one up as you go.

Every arc, every character is here. Even minor ones like Cui, Appule, or the Ginyu Force’s side antics. Civilians? Optional — they exist, but they don’t matter much unless you make them relevant.

This is built with Deepseek in mind. I did something a LITTLE different here, focused heavily on custom locks/prompts, and made a background 'narrator' that just keeps tabs on information that'd make logical sense in the timeline. Feedback is GREATLY appreciated. Comparing it to the MHA bot.

Have fun. Just don’t expect the Dragon Balls to save you from everything, especially Deepseek. I'm looking at you. This is a test bot, that I made public. Feel free to critique or suggest help. I hate that smut bots are easier to make than this shit.


Side note? I found posting stuff into your chat summary helps. Like...anti-fluff rules, system notes OOC
creator: LightroHero
